description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a double-cutaway design, finished in a sunburst pattern that transitions from dark brown at the edges to a lighter amber in the center. The front features a red tortoiseshell-style pickguard, three single-coil pickups, and a set of white control knobs and a five-way selector switch. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, with dot inlays along the fretboard and a headstock that displays six inline tuning pegs. The back of the guitar shows a contoured body for player comfort and a bolt-on neck construction. The guitar is supported by a black stand, which is not part of the instrument itself. Chrome hardware, including the bridge and tuning machines, adds a metallic accent to the overall appearance.
description: A sunburst-finished, double-cutaway electric guitar with a red pickguard, three single-coil pickups, and a maple neck, displayed on a black stand.
description_view_0: Side view showing the guitar's thickness, the contour of the body, and the black stand supporting it.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sunburst finish, red pickguard, three single-coil pickups, and white control knobs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the guitar's thickness and the placement of the stand.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the contoured back, bolt-on neck joint, and the full length of the maple neck and headstock.
attribute_headstock_design: Six-inline tuning pegs, light wood, slightly curved contour, possible logo on the front
